summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Mezzora Pizza visual redesign. All new features tested and working correctly: dark immersive hero with stock photo, new BestSellers section with 6 pizza cards, transparent-to-solid header on scroll. All previous functionality preserved.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - public showcase website
seed_data_creation: Test contact message submitted via form
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual redesign iteration 2 complete. All features verified: Hero (dark bg with unsplash pizza image, Mezzora logo, 'Pizzas Artisanales depuis 1997' title, phone CTA 'Commander : 01 47 49 49 04', scroll indicator), Header (transparent at top rgba(0,0,0,0) -> solid dark rgba(26,20,16,0.95) on scroll, desktop nav + mobile hamburger), BestSellers (6 pizzas: Pantagruelle, Chef, Royale, 4 Fromages, Savoyarde, Orientale with real product images and prices, 'Voir toute la carte' button works), About section with 3 value cards, Rubrics (Notre Carte/Formules Midi/Offres tabs all working), Menu with all category tabs (Base Tomate, Crème, BBQ, etc.), Formules Midi WITHOUT cart buttons, Offres with 2+1 deal only, Reviews carousel with names, Contact form POST /api/contact/ works, Footer with restaurant info. No cart/shopping functionality anywhere as expected. Mobile responsive layout verified.
tests_passed: Homepage loads with all sections in correct order: Hero > BestSellers > About > Rubrics > Reviews > Contact > Footer
Hero section: dark immersive background with pizza stock photo from unsplash
Hero: Mezzora logo displayed
Hero: 'Pizzas Artisanales depuis 1997' title with gold accent
Hero: Phone CTA 'Commander : 01 47 49 49 04' button
Hero: Scroll indicator (chevron down with animation)
Header: transparent at top (rgba(0,0,0,0))
Header: solid dark (#1a1410/rgba(26,20,16,0.95)) when scrolled past 80px
Header: Desktop nav (Accueil, Notre Carte, Formules Midi, Offres, Contact, Itinéraire, Phone button)
Header: Mobile phone button 'Appeler' + hamburger menu
Mobile hamburger menu opens/closes correctly with all nav items
BestSellers: 6 pizza cards (Pantagruelle 17€, Chef 17€, Royale 16€, 4 Fromages 16€, Savoyarde 16€, Orientale 16€)
BestSellers: Real product images from /images/menu/ folder
BestSellers: 'Voir toute la carte' button navigates to menu section
About section 'Notre Histoire' with 3 value cards (Pâte Fraîche, Ingrédients Frais, 28 Ans)
Rubrics section: 3 clickable cards (Notre Carte, Formules Midi, Offres Spéciales)
Menu: All category tabs working (Base Tomate, Crème, BBQ, Calzones, Pâtes, Paninis, Tex-Mex, Sandwichs, Salades, Desserts, Boissons)
Menu: Pizza cards with warm styling, prices for Junior/Senior/Méga sizes
Formules Midi: 4 lunch formulas displayed WITHOUT cart buttons
Offres: Only offers content (2+1 deal, À Emporter prices, Livraison prices, free delivery banner)
Offres: NO pizzas/menu items shown below offers
Reviews carousel: Customer reviews with names (Thomas D.) and navigation dots
Contact: Phone banner with '01 47 49 49 04'
Contact form: All fields present (name, email, phone, subject, message)
Contact form: POST /api/contact/ works - success message displayed
Contact: Google Maps embed present
Footer: Restaurant info, hours, contact details on dark brown background
No cart/shopping buttons anywhere on the site
Mobile responsive layout verified for all sections
